purpose: Portable Python/tkinter GUI that merges, cleans, and relabels .ics calendar files into a single RFC 5545-compliant output. No installer, no internet dependency.

folder_structure.01_App/: All application code. icsscrub.py is the entry point.
folder_structure.01_App/lib/: Vendored dependency: icalendar library. Do not modify.
folder_structure.01_App/logo.png: Splash screen and README header image.
folder_structure.02_user_manual/: This folder. Human and LLM reference docs.
folder_structure.03_Input/: User drops .ics source files here. Gitignored except .gitkeep.
folder_structure.04_Output/: Merged output written here. Gitignored except .gitkeep.
folder_structure.run_calendarforge.sh: Linux/Mac launcher. Probes for Python >= 3.8, launches 01_App/icsscrub.py.

01_App/icsscrub.py.role: tkinter GUI — 3-tab Notebook: Files, Options, Output.
01_App/icsscrub.py.splash: 2.5s splash screen on launch using logo.png. root.withdraw() called in __init__, deiconify() fires after splash.
01_App/icsscrub.py.threading: generate() runs merge_files() in a daemon thread. UI polls via root.after(150, poll). Never call tkinter from the worker thread.
01_App/icsscrub.py.generate_modes: stop_on_error=True (Generate button) vs stop_on_error=False (Generate collect-all button).

01_App/ics_processor.py.role: Pure ICS logic — no GUI import. Can be run standalone for self-check.

key_types.MergeStats: dataclass returned by merge_files(); tracks per_file counts, duplicates_removed, skipped_no_dtstart, date_filtered, cancelled_excluded, file_errors

01_App/ics_processor.py.dedup_strategy: First file in list wins on duplicate UID.
01_App/ics_processor.py.pre1900_handling: Regex strips pre-1900 and negative-year timestamps from raw bytes before parsing.
01_App/ics_processor.py.missing_end_tag: _read_file_chunks() synthesizes END:VCALENDAR if file is truncated.
01_App/ics_processor.py.dtstart_errors: Unparseable DTSTART logs a warning and increments skipped_no_dtstart; does not raise.

vendored_deps.icalendar: Loaded via sys.path.insert(0, str(_APP_DIR / 'lib')) at top of icsscrub.py. Do not add pip or requirements.txt installs for runtime deps — vendor into lib/ instead.
vendored_deps.zoneinfo: stdlib (Python 3.9+). Imported with fallback to UTC list for Python 3.8.

design_rules: YAGNI — build only what is requested. No speculative features.
No runtime pip install. All dependencies must be in 01_App/lib/ or stdlib.
Never import tkinter from ics_processor.py — keep logic and GUI fully separated.
Atomic output write: write to .icsscrub.tmp then os.replace() to final path.
Input/output directories are always relative to repo root (_ROOT_DIR), not app dir.
Logo path is relative to _APP_DIR (01_App/logo.png), not root.
Splash requires splash._img_ref = img to prevent tkinter PhotoImage GC.

options_model.append_alarms: bool — saves original reminder timing in DESCRIPTION
options_model.calendar_name: str — written as X-WR-CALNAME in output

generate_buttons.Generate: stop_on_error=True — halts at first bad file
generate_buttons.Generate (collect all errors): stop_on_error=False — skips bad files, reports all at end

ui_conventions.options_descriptions: Plain language, no jargon. Describe the user-facing consequence, not the ICS field name.

git_notes.gitignore: 03_Input/* and 04_Output/* are ignored. .gitkeep files hold the directories.
git_notes.github_remote: Public repo. Treat pushes as public-facing — confirm with the repo owner before pushing.
git_notes.deploy_key: If a deploy key is configured, treat it as production credentials.

common_pitfalls: Changing _INPUT_DIR/_OUTPUT_DIR: must also update .gitignore to match folder names.
Moving logo.png out of 01_App/ breaks splash screen — _LOGO_PATH is _APP_DIR / 'logo.png'.
Adding a new top-level folder for input/output: update both icsscrub.py constants and .gitignore.
Editing 03_Input or 04_Output folder names: grep the whole repo — at minimum icsscrub.py and .gitignore.
